items.title: Schreuder lacht om vragen over Champions League bij NEC
items.summary: NEC bewees zaterdag dat slechte wedstrijden ook gewonnen kunnen worden. De Nijmegenaren maakten bepaald geen goede indruk tegen PEC Zwolle, maar wonnen wel. Zo hield NEC uitzicht op nummer twee Ajax, maar met vragen over Champions League-tickets hoeft men niet aan te komen bij Dick Schreuder.

items.title: Veerman zoekt niet naar excuses en geeft iedereen de schuld na puntenverlies
items.summary: Joey Veerman stond zaterdagavond zwaar chagrijnig de pers te woord na het puntenverlies tegen NAC Breda. Een nederlaag werd in de slotfase nog voorkomen , maar ook dat toverde geen glimlach op het gezicht van de PSV-middenvelder.

items.title: VI Live: Excelsior laat Twente schrikken, Mbappé schiet Real op voorsprong
items.summary: Zaterdag staan er weer veel fraaie potjes in binnen- en buitenland op het programma. NEC krijgt bezoek van PEC Zwolle, FC Twente speelt tegen Excelsior en in het buitenland komen onder meer Liverpool, Manchester City, Bayern München en Real Madrid in actie. Volg het voetbal in de VI Live.

items.title: VI Live: PSV ziet reeks van dertien zeges in de Eredivisie eindigen
items.summary: PSV staat zaterdagavond om 20.00 uur in het Philips Stadion tegenover NAC Breda. De ploeg van Peter Bosz won dertien Eredivisie-duels op rij en hoopt de veertiende aan die zegereeks toe te voegen. Volg de wedstrijd op de voet in deze VI Live.

items.title: NAC zit PSV in de weg dankzij gewaagd pressieplan
items.summary: PSV heeft na dertien achtereenvolgende competitiezeges weer eens puntenverlies geleden. Oorzaak van deze uitglijder: een uitstekend strijdplan van NAC-trainer Carl Hoefkens. Hoe een mix van hoge druk en secure mandekking bijna voor de ultieme stunt zorgde.

items.title: Are Spurs being dragged into a relegation scrap with West Ham rejuvenated?
Adli's stoppage-time winner ends Liverpool unbeaten run in thriller
items.summary: Amine Adli scores a stoppage-time winner as Bournemouth end Liverpool's 13-game unbeaten run in a thrilling match at Vitality Stadium.

items.title: Bowen leads West Ham to important win over Sunderland
items.summary: A fantastic first-half performance helps West Ham blow away Sunderland and move to within two points of 17th-placed Nottingham Forest and safety.

items.title: Late Romero header rescues draw for Tottenham at Burnley
items.summary: Cristian Romero rescues a point for Tottenham Hotspur late on just as under-pressure head coach Thomas Frank faced further embarrassment against struggling Burnley at Turf Moor.

items.title: Marmoush scores as Man City return to winning ways against Wolves
items.summary: Omar Marmoush scores his first Premier League goal of the season to help Manchester City return to winning ways by easing past bottom side Wolves at Etihad Stadium.

items.title: Late Wilson free-kick completes Fulham comeback win over Brighton
items.summary: Harry Wilson scores a spectacular late free-kick as Fulham come from behind to defeat Brighton at Craven Cottage.

items.title: Late drama! Liverpool drop MORE points as Bournemouth snatch last-gasp win
items.summary: Highlights from the Premier League clash between Bournemouth and Liverpool

items.title: Wrexham move into playoff spot with dramatic win
items.summary: Wrexham's bid for a fourth straight promotion and a place in the Premier League is gaining steam.

items.title: Bournemouth shock Liverpool with late winner
items.summary: Amine Adli struck deep into stoppage time to secure a 3-2 win for Bournemouth against Liverpool.

items.title: Bayern stunned by Augsburg for 1st league loss
items.summary: Bayern Munich slumped to its first Bundesliga defeat of the season by 2-1 at home to Bavarian rival Augsburg on Saturday.

items.title: Guardiola blasts officials: 'We won despite them'
items.summary: Pep Guardiola launched into a stinging attack on referees following Manchester City's 2-0 win over Wolves.

items.title: NC Courage appoint Häcken boss Lind head coach
items.summary: The North Carolina Courage announced Mak Lind as the team's new head coach on Saturday.

items.title: Adli scrambles last-gasp winner as Bournemouth take down Liverpool
items.summary: Where to start with this intoxicating Premier League white-knuckle ride? As second-half stoppage time ticked into a fifth minute, the Bournemouth defender James Hill hurled one last long throw into the box and, after Ryan Gravenberch inadvertently poked the ball against a post in a desperate attempt to clear and with Alisson slipping and sliding on the sodden surface, Amine Adli wellied in a winner from an acute angle with virtually the last kick to condemn Liverpool to defeat. Fifteen minutes earlier Dominik Szoboszlai cannoned in a stunning free-kick to haul Arne Slot’s side level from two goals down. Where would Liverpool be this season without the Hungary midfielder? Slot clenched both fists and gave his assistant Giovanni van Bronckhorst a high 10, but it was Andoni Iraola, beaming from ear to ear, who departed the pitch high-fiving his staff, only a second win since October secured. “It is probably the best goal to score … 10 seconds before I asked the fourth official [how long was left] and he told me the game would be over after the throw.” Continue reading...

items.title: Adli strikes late for Bournemouth to end Liverpool's unbeaten run
items.summary: Liverpool's unbeaten run went up in smoke as Amine Adli scored a stoppage-time winner for Bournemouth in a dramatic 3-2 victory.

items.title: Steelers to hire McCarthy as head coach
items.summary: The Pittsburgh Steelers are set to hire Mike McCarthy as their new head coach after reaching a verbal agreement.
